body:
Tom and I have been talking your ears off about this new DNC, and it's because we're excited about the work we're doing together.
---
Tom and I have been talking your ear off about this new DNC -- because we're excited about the work we're doing together.

We're investing in true grassroots organizing in every community across this great nation so we can win back Congress with people power. But we must fight for our values in every race, in every state, every year.

No one else is going to get it done if we don't -- so I'm asking you to step up before Thursday's deadline.

**Contribute $3 before Thursday's deadline to help Democrats win in all 50 states this year.**

name: Carol Forbes and Victoria Marquesen
subject: Since J.D. Scholten was five
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
As former Iowans who have known J.D. Scholten since he was a child, we are writing to ask for your support for J.D. in the June 5th Democratic primary for Congress.

J.D. has the progressive Iowa values and the energy and work ethic to beat Steve King and return respect to the office. You can learn more about J.D. and what he will do for all of us at his website below:
[**_https://www.scholten4iowa.com/_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1291371/7092884/1470095344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjE3MGU0NS1kODYxLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9mljrKnwCF6IcSP_ite8bL_BQ7LPn5c-mBxFHSbKc8=)
Our support for J.D. is based on our personal history of knowing him as a young child, as a youth, and as an adult. **We first met J.D. when he was 5 years old** as his family moved to Sioux City, where his father, Jim Scholten, joined us at Morningside College. Over the years, the Scholten children were often part of our activities -- at Democrat and community meetings, in political activities such as fundraising, “leafleting” and canvassing, and, of course, at sporting events. The years passed and we each moved away from Sioux City, but still maintained our friendships and family ties to the region.

Over these years, J.D. developed into an outstanding baseball player at East High School in Sioux City, Morningside College, and the University of Nebraska, pursuing pitching with dedication. However, J.D. has always been a well-rounded person (e.g., he took dancing lessons as a child) with strong interests in the study of history, literature, and law. **His natural curiosity, his ability to be both a leader and member of a team, and his genuine affection for his family and empathy for those in need are all characteristics J.D. possesses that we need in Congress**. One of many revealing examples: as an adult, J.D. put his career and life on hold and moved to Minnesota to care for his grandmother with her recovery from surgery.
**The residents of the Iowa 4th Congressional District deserve someone like J.D. who will work tirelessly for all its citizens, for Iowa’s economic future, for Iowa’s agriculture, and for health care for all.** Because we have witnessed J.D.’s values, his temperament, and his commitment to service, we encourage you to learn more about J.D. – check out his website or, better yet, attend one of the many events he is holding all across the 4th District.

We know you will be pleased and ready to vote J.D. Scholten in the primary on **June 5, 2018.**

Sincerely,
Carol Forbes and Victoria Marquesen

**P.S. If you’re not in the district and would like to help us send J.D. to Congress, your donations of any size can really make a difference. You can contribute at the button below. Thank you so much!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1291372/7092885/-367216136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjE3MGU0NS1kODYxLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9mljrKnwCF6IcSP_ite8bL_BQ7LPn5c-mBxFHSbKc8=)

Scholten4Iowa

Sioux City, IA 51102

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: Reminder: Congress does favors for the banks
body:
Wagner loves Wall Street...and Wall Street loves Wagner
---
| | | | | |
---
| Another Wall Street giveaway;Dodd-Frank rules repealed for most banks
---
| | |
---|---
|
When the banks started collapsing in 2007 and 2008, politicians didn't think twice before handing over $700 Billion to help banks weather the storm.

Meanwhile, families in Affton, Arnold, Chesterfield, and O'Fallon saw high unemployment, plummeting home values, and crushing foreclosures.

Not a single banker has been prosecuted, and now, Wall Street is running the show through its bought-and-paid-for politicians, just as before. [Rep. Wagner just voted on a bill that exempts many banks from certain requirements of Dodd-Frank that protect consumers and investors.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PjJnZGMbmxZU8vIEFeZv1bWMgBRgl2FiYkPaw1KxUKoykBNIcihzEuS4VQLQeq6b_5PuxhDFPwJTz5xbQQyEt6P5CchU0l1PKA-Ksw79Y9XitrzhA5RwcrQ7mAOqSWg4iUElOXQpMfXzT6KKbJgzjx7ChQNvBWzCjR8vnHPWLuAyq7UFN_zZITVG5Fnq8OE4sK7KRgruxrPhau_e57t3FT9jkv1I9MULJ578onO5GK2gsxNRvGfLrz3IALMGsbP2vYSHnEXsgBzNXx1wPYMEpIDhd5DA7elWQ5byDMfPnROP2pcVkRkoxcczJKODf7ooqVlgtrtI2lJzNkc2bpb3y0pLRLFICpfrgieO3Y452jsGkgj2EVkzPHCjuVQxVQNPPOZWYlWChMduq4HfubkY_iDs804cHXLN&c=mXghd-ajV3n9dBRwydLGc4-XzABDCOBJwr3WVjOtmMLSUmI85EqzLg==&ch=GYvagG2B2jR4QiB9qBnohtu0NrsSCXAHwaLTQMvkwhweejzVMD1Xaw==)

This year, we have a chance to hold pro-Wall Street politicians accountable, and send a representative to Washington who will do what's best for real people -- not the billion-dollar banks and corporations.

But in order to push back against extremely well-funded corporate interests, we need your financial support.

[Help us continue building the broad coalition it will take to beat Ann Wagner. Your contribution of $25 lets us produce 3 yard signs and a T-shirt, or get up to 4 volunteers started knocking on doors. Want to make a bigger impact? Give the max, $2,700, and help us send union-printed direct mail about Ann Wagner's anti-worker record to 5,000 homes in the district.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PjJnZGMbmxZU8vIEFeZv1bWMgBRgl2FiYkPaw1KxUKoykBNIcihzEtoydpbaoZ7ggS_-ZO65GK0NyP0VFGkJoWzPE8SsKH50rX3j1qldV-qtnOWbBuiIcOC7E0XTsqoM44z5W1hFcQDbFN1jlD77GP3XmAf6pd2BeDXGHbQnkwqtbYc1yT5EAnGHZXavfwv7swH2_aUCZW9s7iXhIez9ZqmfOGpdzfwefk-Sg0SkyvlMRiuidah8yQ==&c=mXghd-ajV3n9dBRwydLGc4-XzABDCOBJwr3WVjOtmMLSUmI85EqzLg==&ch=GYvagG2B2jR4QiB9qBnohtu0NrsSCXAHwaLTQMvkwhweejzVMD1Xaw==)

If you've given or volunteered already, thank you, and if not, we hope you'll join the campaign today.

We can, and will, make our government better. I will never forget where I came from, and the needs of those who sent me to Washington.

Very respectfully,

Mark J. Osmack

Hey there --
Our grassroots organizing team is relentless. They're doing whatever it takes: knocking on every door, making every phone call, and leaving no stone unturned to build the movement we need to win on Election Day this November.
When the going gets tough, this is the team we're going to rely on to spread our message past Ted Cruz's attacks, engage folks turned off by the nastiness of Ted Cruz's Washington and get out the vote on Election Day. **This is the team that 's going to win this election and ****send****Beto to the Senate.**
Frankly, I work this team hard. There are no excuses. But this team is tough, and they work their tails off.
**[So right now, I'm asking you to support our team's work with a contribution of $3 before the critical end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight on May 31. I can tell you right now, your contribution will help make an organizer's day. Plus, with the Koch brothers ramping up to spend big against Beto, we need to be sure we're prepared to fight back in the field. ](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9214b/3b1d797/7d53c454/35a870a8/1166120357/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180527-EOM3&amount=3")**

We need printers so organizers don't have to drive miles just to find a place to print. We need clipboards to make sure our volunteers can canvass neighborhoods all over Texas and talk to voters about Beto. We need new handouts for our canvassers and new stickers for our volunteers.
I'm telling you all this so that you know when I send you an email, I'm doing it because our campaign needs you. It's the only way we're going to beat Ted Cruz. It's the only way we're going to elect Beto.
**[So help me make an organizer's day. Contribute $3 before the deadline at midnight on May 31 to support the hard work we're doing to elect Beto. There are some phone calls I really can't wait to make.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9214b/3b1d797/7d53c454/35a870a8/1166120357/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180527-EOM3&amount=3")**
Thanks for all you're doing to elect Beto. Onward!
Zack Malitz
Field Director

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: A Better Senator Than Me...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Peter,**

**A BETTER SENATOR THAN I**

We remember many loved ones this Memorial Day Weekend. Today, I reflect on a former colleague and friend. He would have made for a worthier senator than I, and I want to introduce you to the person he was.

Brendan Looney and I served together in Iraq. After graduating from the U.S. Naval Academy, Brendan served as an Intelligence Officer with Navy Special Warfare before becoming a Navy SEAL.

While working with Brendan, I learned lessons that will serve Missouri well should I earn the honor of being your next U.S. Senator.

**Listening to the Wisdom of your Team**
Brendan was always good about placing his ego in his back pocket. He might have been the smartest and hardest working member of the team, but he was always respectful of others' views. The final outcome was always the top priority.

**Service Before Self**
Brendan understood that service meant placing those on your team before yourself. Service means working with difficult people, or people who find you difficult, in order to reach a successful goal.

**Never Get Outworked**
Brendan refused to be outworked. Brendan Inspired everyone around him to work harder. Through his work ethic he taught us, there is always more to give; there is always more to do.

Brendan made the ultimate sacrifice for this nation. Since Brendan is not here, the responsibility of service falls on our shoulders. We all have someone we are carrying the torch for each day. Everyday we are fighting for our families, our society, our faith.

When I'm faced with challenges in this race, to earn the nomination to run against Claire here in Missouri, I think about Brendan. I can't give up. I can't stop fighting to restore this Constitutional Republic. Brendan is no longer here to do it with us. We must carry the torch for those who have passed and those who have come before us.

Now, our Constitutional Republic is under threat; not just by a foreign entity, but by the deep state in Washington who are working night and day against President Trump and the American people.

When I enlisted in the U.S. Navy, I pledged to defend the Constitution with my life against enemies foreign and domestic. I didn't understand the nature of the domestic enemy until I entered the world of politics. I'm fighting establishment (domestic) enemies everyday who are creating an autocratic government, working to eliminate your vote, and enemies who are keeping true patriots from serving in Washington. My torch is to take Brendan's passion for our country, his honor, and his leadership to clean up the quagmire in D.C.

Let's carry this torch together -- we must continue the fight, we must remember those who have come before us, and those who have made today possible. We can fight alone, but together we prevail. Here's to our fight.
[Stand with me.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=c88191ae3e&e=9da9b0ca31)

Courtland Sykes

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, A BETTER SENATOR THAN I We remember many loved ones this Memorial Day Weekend. Today, I reflect on a former colleague and friend. He would have made for a worthier senator than I, and I want to introduce you to the person he was. Brendan Looney and I served together in Iraq. After graduating from the U.S. Naval Academy, Brendan served as an Intelligence Officer with Navy Special Warfare before becoming a Navy SEAL. While working with Brendan, I learned lessons that will serve Missouri well should I earn the honor of being your next U.S. Senator. Listening to the Wisdom of your Team Brendan was always good about placing his ego in his back pocket. He might have been the smartest and hardest working member of the team, but he was always respectful of others' views. The final outcome was always the top priority. Service Before Self Brendan understood that service meant placing those on your team before yourself. Service means working with difficult people, or people who find you difficult, in order to reach a successful goal. Never Get Outworked Brendan refused to be outworked. Brendan Inspired everyone around him to work harder. Through his work ethic he taught us, there is always more to give; there is always more to do. Brendan made the ultimate sacrifice for this nation. Since Brendan is not here, the responsibility of service falls on our shoulders. We all have someone we are carrying the torch for each day. Everyday we are fighting for our families, our society, our faith. When I'm faced with challenges in this race, to earn the nomination to run against Claire here in Missouri, I think about Brendan. I can't give up. I can't stop fighting to restore this Constitutional Republic. Brendan is no longer here to do it with us. We must carry the torch for those who have passed and those who have come before us. Now, our Constitutional Republic is under threat; not just by a foreign entity, but by the deep state in Washington who are working night and day against President Trump and the American people. When I enlisted in the U.S. Navy, I pledged to defend the Constitution with my life against enemies foreign and domestic. I didn't understand the nature of the domestic enemy until I entered the world of politics. I'm fighting establishment (domestic) enemies everyday who are creating an autocratic government, working to eliminate your vote, and enemies who are keeping true patriots from serving in Washington. My torch is to take Brendan's passion for our country, his honor, and his leadership to clean up the quagmire in D.C. Let's carry this torch together -- we must continue the fight, we must remember those who have come before us, and those who have made today possible. We can fight alone, but together we prevail. Here's to our fight. Courtland Sykes | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Sykes is America's boldest, most outspoken candidate on issues you care most about: God and Family First Pro-Strong Military Pro-Wall Pro-Gun Pro-Law Enforcement Pro-Lower Taxes Pro-Energy Pro-School Choice Oppose-Radical Feminist Agenda Oppose-Globalism Oppose-Green Lunacy #1 Constitutional Conservative America Number One MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE Courtland Sykes for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: help my dad and get a bumper sticker!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Donald Trump and Republicans in control of Congress have tried, repeatedly, to defund Planned Parenthood and to make it harder for women to access the care they deserve. They don't understand that women should have the freedom to make personal, private health decisions with their doctors, not their politicians. **But my dad does.** Every step of the way, he's fighting to make sure that their efforts are unsuccessful. With everything at stake this year, it's incredibly important to keep him fighting on behalf of women and families across this country. This month's goal is the biggest one yet. And dad's falling behind at a time when the polls aren't looking too good. So let's make a deal. [_**If you make a contribution, even if it 's just $5 to my dad, we'll send you one of our official Women for Sherrod bumper stickers.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffacf/4462dc26/5c319d1c/2007eb87/3820586904/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180527?refcode=sbe180527_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | [](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffacf/4462dc26/5c319d1c/2007eb87/3820586904/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180527?refcode=sbe180527_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
This way you can show your support for my dad, help him hit this goal, and be the reason we have a fighter in our corner in the U.S. Senate.
Our country has made a lot of progress in terms of women's rights and women's health. We can't let Donald Trump or Republicans undo that progress.
Which is why we need my dad to win this year. He'll keep them in check and build on that progress.
[_**So rush in a donation and claim your bumper sticker!**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffacf/4462dc26/5c319d1c/2007eb87/3820586904/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180527?refcode=sbe180527_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
| | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffacf/4462dc26/5c319d1c/2007eb87/3820586904/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180527?refcode=sbe180527_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Thank you for hearing me out and helping out my dad,
Liz Brown
